title: Demon Hunter
short: A Roblox RPG where players fight as Demon Slayers or Demons in parry-based combat with faction-based progression.
description:
Demon Hunter is a competitive RPG built in Roblox where players align with one of two factions: Demon Slayers or Demons. The core of the game is a parry-based combat system that emphasizes timing, precision, and skillful counterplay. Players face off in structured events and matchmaking modes, pitting the two factions against one another in intense duels and large-scale battles.

Beyond combat, the game features a faction-based progression system. Players climb through the ranks of their chosen side — advancing as disciplined Demon Slayers or rising in power as fearsome Demons. This ranking system provides long-term goals, fosters replayability, and deepens the rivalry between factions.

Designed around competitive balance, the combat system rewards mastery of parries, dodges, and counterattacks rather than simple button mashing. Event-based matchmaking ensures that players are continually placed in fresh encounters, encouraging both cooperative faction play and individual skill progression.

This project highlights systems design and implementation within the Roblox engine, including custom combat mechanics, matchmaking logic, event-based gameplay loops, and a progression framework. Demon Hunter showcases my ability to script advanced gameplay systems in Luau while delivering an engaging, competitive multiplayer experience.
contribution:
• Designed and implemented base combat system. 
• Implemented advanced enemy AI 
• Designed and made a customizable ability sytem for breathing styles.
• Made cross-server faction matchmaking.
• Implemented Perks system. 
• Made basic blade crafting/upgrade system.
